use_cases: Displaying sentiment analysis results with percentage breakdowns
Showing user feedback distribution through animated progress bars
Visualizing positive, negative, and neutral sentiment proportions
Providing quick sentiment overviews in dashboards
Tracking brand or product perception metrics
ai_summary: A sentiment analysis card component that displays categorized sentiment data through animated segmented progress bars. Features a clean header with overall sentiment indicator, icon support, and accessibility-friendly progress bar with percentage calculations. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and uses shadcn-style utility classes for theming.
